---
name: Spec question / clarification
about: Ask a question about the SBP spec or an ambiguity in the wording
title: "[Spec] "
labels: spec, question
assignees: ""
---

## Question

What part of the spec is unclear?

**Section:** (e.g. §7.3 Tether semantics)

**Quote from the spec:** (paste the ambiguous text)

**Your question:**

## Your use case

What are you trying to implement and why does the ambiguity matter?

## Your proposed interpretation

How do you currently read it? What behavior would you expect?
